description:
Offered: every other year
This course can be taken in any sequence with Biochemistry I. Topics include enzyme mechanisms, pathways and regulation of carbohydrate, lipid, amino acid, and nucleic acid biosynthesis and catabolism, photosynthesis, DNA replication, transcription and translation. Cross-listed with BIOL 3040
Prerequisite(s): BIOL 1800 and CHEM 2000
Note: Students can only receive credit for BIOL 3040 OR CHEM 3040.
